_comment: Hand-editable cross-cloud token-price comparison (USD per 1M tokens, on-demand/standard). 'list' = OpenRouter/model-maker direct list price (from the OpenRouter models feed, HARD). Each cloud cell carries a confidence flag: official=from that venue's own page/feed; list=venue resells the first-party model at the model-maker's list (documented mechanism, ~0 dispersion); reported=scraped from the venue page but not hand-verified in its interactive table; native=venue is the model's home (=list); pending=offered on the venue but price not yet captured; na=not offered there. KEY FINDING: first-party frontier models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok) cost ~the same everywhere because the lab sets one list price; OPEN-weight models (DeepSeek/Qwen/etc.) carry a real hyperscaler premium.

sources.list: OpenRouter /api/v1/models feed, fetched 2026-07-21 (= model-maker first-party list)
sources.bedrock: AWS Bedrock pricing page aws.amazon.com/bedrock/pricing (read 2026-07-21): confirmed Claude Sonnet 5 $2/$10 promo thru 2026-08-31, Mistral Large 3 $0.50/$1.50, legacy Claude 3.5 Sonnet extended-access $6/$30, DeepSeek-R1 example $1.35/$5.40
sources.vertex: cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise-agent-platform/generative-ai/pricing (read 2026-07-21, user-supplied): Gemini official incl. cache/batch/long-context/regional; NO partner (Claude/Llama) prices published there
sources.azure: Azure OpenAI list (page fetch failed 2026-07-21) => shown as list-by-mechanism

mechanics._comment: Official pricing mechanics per venue (read 2026-07-21). The stylized facts: cache-read ~10% of input and batch ~50% off EVERYWHERE; differentiation is long-context surcharge and regional premia.

rows.regional: Bedrock: extended-access fee on legacy models ($6/$30 3.5-Sonnet)

rows.long_context: Pro >200K ctx: input 2x ($2->$4), output 1.5x ($12->$18); Flash: no surcharge
rows.regional: non-global endpoints +10% (Gemini 3+, from 2026-07-01); audio input 3.3x on 2.5 Flash
per-region price tables; cross-region inference tiers

bedrock.note: resells at Anthropic list; page's $6/$30 is legacy 3.5-Sonnet extended-access, not this
only OpenAI OSS models on Bedrock, not GPT-5.x

azure.note: Azure OpenAI resells at OpenAI list; official page not captured

vertex.note: global tier; non-global +10% ($1.65/$9.90); cache-read $0.15; batch $0.75/$4.50; no long-context surcharge

azure.note: Grok on Azure AI Foundry; resells at xAI list (unverified)

bedrock.note: AWS page fetch; ~2.3x in / 4.6x out vs cheapest route
on Bedrock; current price not captured (page text showed legacy Llama 2 only)
